mapper.select: /* 데이터셋 요약 조회 dataset.selectDatasetSummary */ SELECT DS_SUM.TOTAL_DS_CNT AS TOTAL_DATASET_COUNT, DS_SUM.ACTIVE_DS_CNT AS ACTIVE_DATASET_COUNT, DS_SUM.INACTIVE_DS_CNT AS INACTIVE_DATASET_COUNT, DS_SUM.TOTAL_CHUNK_CNT AS TOTAL_VECTOR_COUNT, DS_SUM.AVG_SRCH_QUAL AS AVG_SEARCH_QUALITY, (SRC_SUM.TOTAL_DOC_CNT + SRC_SUM.TOTAL_URL_CNT) AS TOTAL_SOURCE_COUNT, SRC_SUM.TOTAL_DOC_CNT AS TOTAL_DOC_COUNT, SRC_SUM.TOTAL_URL_CNT AS TOTAL_URL_COUNT FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_DS_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN USE_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ACTIVE_DS_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN USE_YN = 'N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS INACTIVE_DS_CNT, COALESCE(SUM(CHUNK_CNT), 0) AS TOTAL_CHUNK_CNT, ROUND(AVG(SRCH_QUAL), 1) AS AVG_SRCH_QUAL FROM TB_DS ) DS_SUM CROSS JOIN ( SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_DOC WHERE USE_YN = 'Y') AS TOTAL_DOC_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_CNT_URL WHERE USE_YN = 'Y') AS TOTAL_URL_CNT ) SRC_SUM

/* 데이터셋 단건 조회 dataset.selectDataset */ SELECT D.DATASET_ID, D.DS_NM, D.DESCRIPTION, D.VERSION, D.CHUNK_ALGO_CD, D.CHUNK_SIZE, D.CHUNK_OVERLAP, D.MIN_CHUNK_SZ, D.HDR_INCL_CD, D.DATASET_BUILD_STATUS_CD, D.EMBED_MODEL_CD, D.VECTOR_DB_CD, D.EMBED_NORM_CD, D.POOL_STRAT_CD, D.DIM_REDUC_CD, D.CHUNK_CNT, D.SRCH_QUAL, D.USE_YN, DATE_FORMAT(D.MODIFY_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS MODIFY_DT, P.LOWERCASE_YN, P.WSP_NORM_YN, P.SPEC_CHR_RM_YN, P.SINGLE_CELL_TEXT, P.SENT_SPLIT_ALGO_CD, P.LANG_DETECT_CD FROM TB_DS D LEFT JOIN TB_DS_PREPROC P ON D.DATASET_ID = P.DATASET_ID WHERE D.DATASET_ID = #{datasetId}
/* 카테고리 목록 조회 dataset.selectCategoryList */ SELECT CATEGORY_ID, CATEGORY_NAME, PARN_CAT_ID, CAT_LVL, SORT_ORD, CREATE_DT FROM TB_CONTENT_CAT ORDER BY SORT_ORD DESC

/* 데이터셋 문서 목록 조회 dataset.selectDatasetDocList */ SELECT A.CATEGORY_ID , A.DOC_ID , A.DOC_TITLE , A.FILE_NAME , A.FILE_SIZE , B.DATASET_ID FROM TB_DOC A LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_DS_DOC B ON B.DOC_ID = A.DOC_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y'

/* 데이터셋 URL 목록 조회 dataset.selectDatasetUrlList */ SELECT A.CATEGORY_ID , A.URL_ID , A.URL_NAME , A.URL_ADDR , B.DATASET_ID FROM TB_CNT_URL A LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_DS_URL B ON B.URL_ID = A.URL_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_DS SET USE_YN = #{useYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MODIFY_DT = NOW() WHERE DATASET_ID = #{datasetId}
